text:
Notes:
- Rates effective January 1, 2024.
- Overtime applies after 8 hours per day or 40 hours per week.
- Double time applies on statutory holidays and Sundays.

Footnotes:
- * Vacation pay calculated on gross earnings including overtime.
- † Total Package includes base rate plus vacation pay only; benefits billed separately.

Units:
- Base Rate: $/hr
- Vac. Pay: %
- Total†: $/hr
